settings.donationText: This app is 100% free and ad-free. If it helps you prepare, you can thank me with a small donation. Thank you for your support! 🙏

training.title: Training
training.introSubtitle: Practice exam — 20 multiple-choice questions drawn at random from the study bank.
training.bullet2: 4 options per question, one correct answer
training.bullet3: Score out of 20 — 15/20 minimum required to be eligible
training.bullet4: Detailed report at the end for review
training.sourceNote: Questions from the official Discover Canada guide (canada.ca).
training.question: Question

info.title: Practical info — Citizenship exam
info.overview: The test has 20 multiple-choice questions. You must score at least 15 correct answers to pass. Topics cover history, geography, institutions, and rights & responsibilities in Canada.
info.format: The test is usually administered in a supervised room and lasts about 30–45 minutes. Bring valid ID and arrive early.
info.tips: Tips: read carefully, eliminate obviously wrong answers, manage your time and skip and return if needed.
